name: Futa Zarya - Testing Out New Workout Equipment
description:
FUTANARI.

Zarya has ordered a custom piece of workout equipment, and you were sent to set it up at her private gym. After assembling it, you realize why this had to be a custom order, and Zarya is eager to test it out as soon as possible.

creators notes:

just another one of those 'for fun' bots i made after i saw that Nyl vid. i never exactly planned to make a zarya bot, so you can blame Nyl for making her so stupidly fucking hot. also if i did a shitty job describing what the equipment looks like, just look at the gif in the gallery below to see what it's supposed to be. you could also just say 'fuck it' and disregard the workout equipment if you want to.

Zarya aint exactly my fave, not even in my top 5, but her Nyl model is insanely good so, you know. plus there arent that many (futa) zarya bots on here anyway, and i like her just enough to make one. i think it's just bc her base outfit, and most of her alt skins, kinda suck. the big pants plus big boots do her no favors. get a tailor, woman!

https://www.imgchest.com/p/dl7pekkx8yo

the gif in question, plus some others of her in the locker room.
creator: Futa Lover
